---
title: "About Me"
classoption:
- twocolumn
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
---

:::::::::::::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}


$~$

Dr. Mu He, Assistant Professor in School of Mathematics and Physics at Xi'an Jiaotong-Liverpool University.

I Joined Xi'an Jiaotong-Liverpool University in 2021, before that I had a short Postdoc fellow experience working at Princess Margaret Cancer Centre, University of Toronto. 

I got my B.Sc. in Applied Mathematics (Investment Science) at the Hong Kong Polytechnic University in 2015, then I received my M.Sc. in Statistics and Ph.D. in Mathematics(Statistics) at McMaster University in 2016 and 2021.

Research interests: Statistics, Reliability and Infectious Disease Dynamics.

:::
::: {.column width="30%"}

![](http://profile.xjtlu.edu.cn/upload/ZZXy8uNxGWTAWatwd3zi.jpg){width=100%}

:::
::::::::::::::






$~$




$~$

|Contact Information:                                                              |
|:--------------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| MB530                                       | Tel: +86 (0512)8897 3043           |
| Department of Foundational Mathematics      |                                    |
| Xi'an Jiaotong-Liverpool University         | Email: mu.he@xjtlu.edu.cn          |
| Suzhou, JiangSu, China                      |                                    |

$~$

![](https://www.xjtlu.edu.cn/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/campus-blossom-2.1f5be76d.jpg){width=100% height=50%}
